design_philosophy.core_principle: Fusion over Imitation. Nautical Elegance meets Commuter Efficiency.
design_philosophy.emotional_goal: Turn a mundane ferry commute into a mini-voyage.
design_philosophy.visual_style: Modern Maritime. High contrast. Sunset warmth against Deep Sea cool.
design_philosophy.target_audience: Coastal commuters in Maharashtra. Needs clarity, large touch targets, and offline-friendly vibes.

typography.instructions: Load fonts using expo-font. If Playfair is unavailable, fallback to system serif. If Manrope is unavailable, fallback to system sans-serif.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL 'nativewind' and 'tailwindcss' immediately. It is the fastest way to implement these styles.
If nativewind is not possible, use StyleSheet.create mapping strictly to the design tokens above.
USE 'expo-font' to load Playfair Display and Manrope. If these exact fonts fail to load, use system serif/sans-serif but keep the weights.
USE 'lucide-react-native' for icons (Boat, Anchor, MapPin, User, MessageCircle).
MOCK OTP: The OTP is always '123456'.
NO ADMIN PANEL: Do not build any admin routes.
NO WEB ONLY CSS: Do not use HTML tags like div, span. Use View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, FlatList.
SAFE AREA: Always wrap screen content in SafeAreaView or use safe-area-insets.
NAVIGATION: Use standard Expo Router file-based navigation (app/_layout.tsx, app/(tabs)/...).
DATA: Use the mock data for trips if backend is not ready, but structure the frontend to fetch from API.
TEST IDS: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do not center align everything. Use left align for text, center for emphasis only.
Use 2x spacing. If you think 8px is enough, use 16px.
Add active opacity to buttons (0.8) for feedback.
Use Lucide icons with stroke width 1.5 or 2 for a crisp look.
The 'Deep Sea Blue' is your brand anchor. Use it for headers and primary buttons.
The 'Sunset Gold' is your action trigger. Use it for 'Book Now', 'Confirm', 'New Trip'.
